strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in event-driven systems and microservices architecture
Diverse experience across multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments
No clear evidence of experience in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited visibility into leadership and governance experience at a senior level

key_factors.factor: Technical expertise in AI and distributed systems
Experience with agentic AI frameworks and production environments

response.justification: The candidate has a strong technical background with experience in AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven systems, but lacks direct experience in fintech and scaling large engineering teams.
